_test_writer_expected_doc: Computed = (complexity_tier in {STANDARD, COMPLEX}) OR (risk_level == 'high'). For this task: complexity_tier=STANDARD ∈ {STANDARD, COMPLEX} → true. Verifiable by jq '.test_writer_expected | type == "boolean"' (returns true) AND jq '.test_writer_expected' (returns true).

requirement.original: Implement Cycle 3 of spec-20260518-225715 — clear 10 known debts from Cycle 1+2.
requirement.clarified: Clear 10 enumerated debts from spec Section 7 'Cycle 2 -> Cycle 3': test-writer skeleton realization (13 files), style-inspector CJK hardening, BA gate-logic auto-check, blast-radius Phase 2 untracked-file detection + bloat reduction, QA Phase 5 trigger symmetry, canary fail-closed depth, AC-08 leak-check deepening, tool-policy BA prefix patch, session-info.sh stdout->stderr, location-complaint tokenization simplification.
requirement.what: Clear 10 discrete debts across harness infrastructure files
requirement.why: Cycle 2 shipped P1-P3 but left 10 known gaps that reduce test coverage, inspector accuracy, canary depth, tool-policy completeness, and procedural symmetry

included: Debt 1: Replace pass in 13 test skeleton files with real pytest assertions
Debt 3: BA gate-logic verification in self-check
Debt 4: blast-radius Phase 2 untracked-file detection + bloat reduction
Debt 5: QA Phase 5 trigger symmetry with dispatch gate
Debt 6: Canary fail-closed depth for write-guard + git-privilege-guard
Debt 7: doc_sync leak suppression for cp-state-* and spec-2026*-*
Debt 8: tool-policy BA blast-radius-map write prefix
excluded: Any new harness components or features
Removing canary advisory-only treatment of session-info.sh / session-git-init.sh (would force fail-hard on session-git-init.sh which is out of scope)

Modifying the Contract D novelty extension Jaccard logic at commands/dev.md:308-314 (iter 2 corrected line numbers from iter 1's 304-310; preservation is contractually required, verbatim byte-for-byte)
Marker-token ceremonial-proof patterns (e.g., iteration-1's `tested_trigger_asymmetry_eliminated: true`) — retracted per codex F4

success_criteria: All 13 test skeleton files contain real assertions (no bare pass, no TEST_INCOMPLETE sentinel)
Style-inspector Standard 6 documents active CJK detection independent of exemptions
BA Quality Standards checklist includes gate-logic verification item
blast-radius git_diff_files unions tracked + untracked files
QA Phase 5 trigger condition mirrors dispatch gate
Canary verify_write_guard and verify_git_privilege_guard have negative-payload tests
doc_sync SKIP sets include cp-state and spec-2026 patterns
BA tool-policy has blast-radius-map write prefix
commands/dev.md location-complaint uses LLM judgment instead of tokenization
constraints: Preserve all existing test metadata (AC_UID, AC_TYPE, docstring) verbatim
Do not modify canary exit-code semantics (0=ok, 2=fail)
session-info.sh stderr redirect must not change content

root_cause_analysis.symptom: 10 discrete infrastructure debts documented in spec Section 7 after Cycle 2 shipped
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: Cycle 1 and 2 were scoped to deliver and remediate the 6 core components; these 10 items were explicitly deferred as follow-up work
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: Prioritization: P1-P3 blockers were higher priority than these depth/hardening items
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: Leaves test skeletons non-functional, inspector incomplete, canary shallow, tool-policy with missing prefixes, and procedural asymmetries in QA
observations: All 13 test_AC_*.py files have body = pass (inferred: Read of each file)
style-inspector.md Standard 6 uses grep-based CJK detection with no content-type awareness (inferred: Read at line 316)
blast-radius git_diff_files uses only git diff --name-only HEAD, no git ls-files --others (inferred: Read at line 259-260)
canary verify_write_guard checks rc>=126 (exec error) but not rc==2 (deny) (inferred: Read at line 88)
canary verify_git_privilege_guard checks rc>=126 and rc==2 for false-positive, but has no deny-payload test (inferred: Read at lines 139-146)
QA Phase 5 triggers on manifest existence not on tier/risk gate (inferred: Read at line 1033)
doc_sync SKIP sets contain agent-scores entries but not cp-state or spec-2026 entries (inferred: Read of regen_readme.py:8-13 and tree.py:6-11)
BA tool-policy has acceptance-criteria- prefix but no blast-radius-map prefix (inferred: Read of tool-policy.v1.json:121-143)
session-info.sh has 10 bare echo calls with no >&2 (inferred: Read at lines 4-28)
commands/dev.md:284-310 uses tokenize + set-intersection + Jaccard + domain-token table (inferred: Read)

expected.value: All gaps closed per spec Section 7 debt list

scope_expansion.search_pattern: N/A — scope defined by spec Section 7 enumeration

attempts.actual_change: 6 new files + 6 modified files + settings.json hook registration
attempts.outcome: /close rejected on 3 axes (consumability, cleanliness, style); 10 debts deferred

novelty_check.rationale: Same layer (L4) but entirely different target locations — the 10 debts are discrete items that were explicitly deferred by Cycle 1 and 2. No prior attempt addressed any of these 10 items. Jaccard overlap of target files between this attempt and Cycle 2 is below 0.5 (Cycle 2 targeted different sections of overlapping files for different purposes).

context.codebase_state: master branch, post-Cycle-2 (commit 1a1d058 + post-close remediation 20a45af + spec arch commit 5771880 + close-report aea75d9)
recent_commits: aea75d9 chore(docs): ship cycle 20260522-000000 close-report and QA verification
5771880 feat(spec): commit spec-20260520-221059 and split views to git (arch-2)
af96c61 fix(infra): M1-M4 gitignore exceptions, install mirror, uncapped_delta

development_approach.strategy: Address all 10 debts as surgical modifications to existing files. No new files created. Each debt is independent — dev can address them in any order. Largest item is Debt 1 (13 test files) which dominates implementation effort.
development_approach.validation_approach: QA verifies each AC independently: run pytest on tests/generated/20260520-221452/, grep for pass-only bodies, read modified files to confirm structural changes, execute canary-verify.sh to validate negative-payload tests, parse tool-policy JSON to verify prefix presence

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex returned 8 substantive findings, all with PROPOSED_FIX: (1) MoSCoW vs success_criteria mismatch; (2) AC-01 satisfiable by vacuous tests; (3) AC-04 missing bloat-reduction verification; (4) AC-07 too weak (must_contain_any allows comment or one pattern in one file to pass); (5) AC-09 grep false-positive on lines ending in '2'; (6) S2 expansionist (would force fail-hard on out-of-scope session-git-init.sh); (7) AC-06 write-guard payload hint wrong (guard blocks overwriting existing files, not arbitrary protected paths); (8) AC-10 greedy on Contract D (line range 270-320 reaches the adjacent Contract D novelty extension block).

findings.issue: Debt 9 and Debt 10 are listed as Should/Could but the user requirement is to clear all 10 debts; context lists them as required success criteria
findings.proposed_fix: Move Debt 9 and Debt 10 into Must Have, or state explicitly that AC-01 through AC-10 are all blocking regardless of MoSCoW labels
findings.rationale: User said 'clear 10 known debts' — all 10 must block. Moved Debt 9 to M9, Debt 10 to M10, added binding-contract preamble to MoSCoW section, removed S/C sections

findings.issue: AC-01 can be satisfied by vacuous tests (assert True passes the substring check)
findings.proposed_fix: Add explicit anti-vacuity checks: forbid assert True/constant assertions/skips, require each test body to reference target files/commands from docstring and assert actual expected behavior
findings.rationale: Critical for AC integrity. Added forbidden_patterns for assert True, assert 1==1, pytest.skip, @pytest.mark.skip; added required_per_file checks for references_docstring_target_file and non_constant_assertion

findings.issue: Blast-radius bloat reduction (6.1MB) is in M4 but not in AC-04
findings.proposed_fix: Add measurable bloat AC: dedup edges, cap edges[] with documented limit, record omitted counts, preserve required fields, stay under defined size on known workload
findings.rationale: M4 promises it; AC must verify. Added runtime_checks for dedup, omitted_edges_count field, per-file cap, and 500KB size limit

findings.issue: AC-07 must_contain_any across [cp-state, spec-2026, startswith] allows a comment or one pattern in one file to pass
findings.proposed_fix: Require each file to contain executable suppression logic for both cp-state- and spec-2026 patterns plus fixture asserting generated output excludes both
findings.rationale: Tightened to per_file_must_contain_all for both patterns, per_file_must_contain_any for prefix-aware filtering, must_be_executable_not_comment flag, fixture_check

findings.issue: AC-09 grep '^[[:space:]]*(echo|printf).*[^>]$' false-positives on 'echo x >&2' because the line ends with '2'
findings.proposed_fix: Use two-stage check: collect echo|printf lines, then fail only those not containing >&2 or 1>&2
findings.rationale: Real bug in the AC regex. Replaced with two_stage_check explicit structure forbidding the broken regex

findings.issue: S2 'Remove canary advisory-only treatment' is expansionist; would force fail-hard on session-git-init.sh which still emits stdout and is out of scope
findings.proposed_fix: Drop S2 entirely, or limit to stale wording about session-info.sh only
findings.rationale: Dropped S2; added to Won't Have / excluded list to make the exclusion explicit

findings.issue: Write-guard deny-payload hint suggests /.claude/hooks/somefile but the guard blocks overwriting EXISTING files, not arbitrary protected paths
findings.proposed_fix: Use existing temp file or existing hook file as Write payload, assert rc==2, cleanup
findings.rationale: Concrete implementation correction. Updated Risk 4 and Technical Hints to use mktemp-created existing file as the deny target

findings.issue: AC-10 scans lines 270-320 and bans Jaccard, reaching the adjacent Contract D novelty extension block at lines 304-310 which independently uses Jaccard
findings.proposed_fix: State explicitly whether Contract D novelty is part of Debt 10; if no, narrow AC range and forbidden terms to location-overlap block only
findings.rationale: Contract D is NOT part of Debt 10 per user's deferred 'not a big deal' framing. Narrowed AC-10 scope to lines 284-303 only; explicitly preserves Contract D block at 304-310 verbatim; added scope_preserved field to verification

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All 8 findings applied. Spec MoSCoW restructured (10 Must-Haves, no Should/Could). 5 ACs tightened with concrete verification logic (AC-01 anti-vacuity, AC-04 bloat measurement, AC-07 per-file executable check, AC-09 two-stage grep, AC-10 scope narrowing). 2 risks/hints corrected (write-guard payload semantics, scope-preservation note for Contract D). Acceptance-criteria JSON regenerated with same 10-item structure but tighter check fields.

codex_consult_iter_2.feedback_summary: Codex returned 12 verdict-relevant findings (F1-F12) against the iter-2 revised ACs. All 12 incorporated as structural changes.

findings.issue: AC-02 heading + phrase checks can pass without real algorithm
findings.proposed_fix: Require numbered MUST steps under new heading (collect-then-classify-then-report ordering)
findings.rationale: Body now mandates 4-step MUST list with scan-before-exemption ordering

findings.issue: AC-02 literal ban 'skip detection' false-positives on legitimate 'MUST NOT skip detection'
findings.proposed_fix: Use positive invariant 'MUST NOT skip CJK scanning for any in-scope file' instead of literal-ban
findings.rationale: Replaced ban with positive invariant phrase; literal-ban check removed

findings.issue: AC-05 heading rename + marker can pass while body stays manifest-gated
findings.proposed_fix: Require Phase 5 body to gate on test_writer_expected==true even when manifests missing; widen pytest gate at line 1036 to OR risk_level==high
findings.rationale: AC-05 now mandates semantic body change AND pytest gate widening

findings.issue: AC-05 'tested_trigger_asymmetry_eliminated: true' marker is ceremonial proof, not behavior
findings.proposed_fix: Drop marker requirement; replace with semantic body assertions
findings.rationale: Marker requirement explicitly RETRACTED in AC-05 clause (e)

findings.issue: AC-10 anchor scoping fixes brittleness but does not force substantive replacement
findings.proposed_fix: Require scoped region to reference complaint_location_keywords, affected_files, located_source by name; bound Contract D preservation to lines 308-314 (not 'onward')
findings.rationale: AC-10 clause (b) names all 3 fields; clause (c) bounds Contract D to 308-314

findings.issue: AC-04 fixed --files invocation bypasses git_diff_files() — Dev could leave --git-diff broken
findings.proposed_fix: Add deterministic temp-git fixture exercising --git-diff --base HEAD branch
findings.rationale: AC-04 added Fixture A: temp git repo with tracked-modified + untracked-non-ignored files

findings.issue: AC-04 edge cap can be dead code — defining constant does not prove application
findings.proposed_fix: Add high-fanout fixture (>50 references); assert per-source edges <= 50 and omitted_edges_count > 0 with exact value
findings.rationale: AC-04 added Fixture B: high-fanout with assertion on emitted count + exact omitted count

findings.issue: AC-04 (from,to) dedup false-positives on legitimate distinct edge_types
findings.proposed_fix: Use (from,to,edge_type) 3-tuple uniqueness
findings.rationale: AC-04 clause (f) redefined dedup as 3-tuple

findings.issue: AC-03 checklist line can be ceremonial without forcing field computation
findings.proposed_fix: Require test_writer_expected boolean in context schema + Field Rule (BA computes from formula + emits with value=formula); jq-verify this task's context.json has true
findings.rationale: AC-03 added clauses (c) and (d): jq returns boolean AND value equals formula

findings.issue: AC-08 only checks new blast-radius prefix; existing acceptance-criteria prefix preservation also part of Debt 8
findings.proposed_fix: jq-assert both prefixes present
findings.rationale: AC-08 clauses (a) and (b) both required

findings.issue: AC-08 exact policy_version 4→5 brittle if concurrent bump
findings.proposed_fix: Pin baseline 4→5 with explicit baseline assertion (acceptable since live state is 4)
findings.rationale: AC-08 clause (c) cites live baseline check; if concurrent bump, Dev rebases and ACs need refresh

findings.issue: BAQA-07 per-AC affected_files can be empty/wrong arrays
findings.proposed_fix: Require non-empty affected_files per AC; live-resolve each path/glob; test glob entry must be {file_glob, count=13, verified_via=Glob} with live count match
findings.rationale: Acceptance-criteria JSON regenerated with affected_files[] per item; component_chain has glob entry with count=13

codex_consult_iter_2.feedback_incorporated: All 12 codex F1-F12 findings applied as structural changes to ACs. Spec is no longer satisfiable by no-op or marker-token edits.

research_findings.reason: All 10 debts are bounded fixes to existing infrastructure with clear requirements from the spec. No external best-practices research needed.
